title: Muối Dưa Giá

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: 1 lb bean sprouts (giá), washed and drained
A small pinch of alum (phèn chua) — this keeps the bean sprouts crunchy

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Wash the bean sprouts and drain well. Peel and julienne the carrot into thin matchsticks. Cut the chives into pieces.
Toss the bean sprouts, chives, and carrot together in a large bowl with the salt and the pinch of alum. Mix everything together.
Pack the mixture tightly into a clean glass jar. Press down firmly.
Add enough warm water to just cover the vegetables. Place a weight on top to keep everything submerged.
Cover and leave at room temperature for about 3 days until sour.
Transfer to the refrigerator once it's sour enough. Serve as a side dish.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
